title: calandrinia linearifolia
intro: Calandrinia linearifolia, also known as Red Maire or Chilean rock purslane, is a succulent plant species native to the Andes mountains in South America. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Calandrinia linearifolia include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and provide relief from respiratory problems. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or tincture for its medicinal uses, with the leaves and stems being dried and used in herbal preparations.
